selection: 按 4–7 岁 阅读者的常用词频与中小学词汇标记筛选

words.translation: n. 例证, 插图
words.definition: n. artwork that helps make something clear or attractive

words.translation: n. 一点点, 少许, 一会儿, 短时间；a. 小的, 很少的, 幼小的, 琐碎的, 短暂的, 矮小的
words.definition: n. a small amount or duration

words.translation: n. 孔, 洞, 穴, 漏洞；vt. 挖洞, 掘坑
words.definition: n. an opening into or through something

words.translation: n. 树, 木料, 树状物；vt. 把...赶上树
words.definition: n. a tall perennial woody plant having a main trunk and branches forming a distinct elevated crown; includes both gymnosperms and angiosperms

words.translation: adv. 离去
words.definition: r. from a particular thing or place or position (`forth' is obsolete)

words.translation: abbr. who is 谁是…
n. 鸟, 羽毛球；vi. 打鸟
words.definition: n. warm-blooded egg-laying vertebrates characterized by feathers and forelimbs modified as wings

words.translation: n. 脂肪, 脂油, 肥肉；a. 肥的, 胖的, 油腻的
words.definition: n. a soft greasy substance occurring in organic tissue and consisting of a mixture of lipids (mostly triglycerides)

words.translation: n. 木材, 木制品；vt. 植林于, 给...添加木柴
words.definition: n. the hard fibrous lignified substance under the bark of trees

words.translation: n. 全部, 完整；a. 充满的, 完全的, 丰富的, 完美的, 丰满的, 详尽的
vt. 建立, 创立, 铸造；find的过去式和过去分词
n. 声音, 嗓音, 嗓子, 愿望, 发言权, 表达, 喉舌, 语态；vt. 表达, 吐露, 调音
words.definition: n. the distinctive quality or pitch or condition of a person's speech

words.translation: n. 坚果, 核心, 螺帽
words.definition: n. usually large hard-shelled seed

words.translation: n. 夜, 夜晚, 晚上, 黑暗, 夜晚的工作
words.definition: n. the time after sunset and before sunrise while it is dark outside

words.translation: a. 几个的, 一些的, 各自的；pron. 几个
words.definition: s. (used with count nouns) of an indefinite number more than 2 or 3 but not many

words.translation: n. 顶部, 顶端, 极点, 上面, 上部, 顶篷, 最高地位, 首位, 陀螺；a. 最高的, 顶上的, 头等的
words.definition: n. the upper part of anything

words.translation: n. 妻子, 太太, 夫人
words.definition: n. a married woman; a man's partner in marriage

words.translation: n. 丈夫, 管理人, 节俭的人；vt. 节俭, 使成丈夫, 持有
words.definition: n. a married man; a woman's partner in marriage

words.translation: n. 春天, 弹簧, 跳跃, 弹性, 活力, 泉, 源泉；a. 春天的
words.definition: n. the season of growth

words.translation: prep. 在...之上, 迫近, 紧接着
words.definition: prep. On; -- used in all the senses of that word, with which it

words.translation: n. 土地, 战场, 场地, 地面, 范围；a. 土地的, 地面上的
words.definition: n. a position to be won or defended in battle (or as if in battle)

words.translation: n. 一半, 半场, 不完全；a. 一半的, 不完全的, 部分的, 半场的
words.definition: n. one of two divisions into which some games or performances are divided: the two divisions are separated by an interval

words.translation: vt. 遗失, 损失, 丢失, 使失去, 错过, 浪费, 迷失, 使迷路, 输去, 使沉溺于；vi. 受损失, 失败
words.definition: v. fail to keep or to maintain; cease to have, either physically or in an abstract sense

words.translation: n. 无, 不关紧要之事, 零；adv. 毫不, 决不
words.definition: n. a quantity of no importance

words.translation: adv. 一次, 曾经, 一旦；conj. 一旦, 一经
words.definition: r. on one occasion

words.translation: vt. 记得, 回忆起, 记住, 铭记, 纪念；vi. 记得
words.definition: v. recall knowledge from memory; have a recollection

words.translation: n. 跑, 赛跑, 奔跑, 奔跑的路程, 趋向, 流出, 运转时间, 连续；vi. 跑, 奔跑, 跑步, 赛跑, 竞赛, 行驶, 运转, 进行, 蔓延

words.translation: n. 噪音, 杂音, 响声, 喧闹；vt. 谣传
words.definition: n. sound of any kind (especially unintelligible or dissonant sound)

words.translation: a. 薄的, 细的, 瘦的, 稀疏的, 稀薄的, 淡的, 弱的, 空洞的；vt. 使变薄, 使变细, 使稀少, 使淡
words.definition: a. of relatively small extent from one surface to the opposite or in cross section

words.translation: n. 床, 睡眠处, 河床, 底座, 路基, 一层；vt. 提供宿处, 栽种, 安装
words.definition: n. a piece of furniture that provides a place to sleep

words.translation: v. 吃, 腐蚀
words.definition: v. take in solid food

words.translation: n. 家, 避难所, 故乡；a. 家庭的, 国内的, 打中目标的
words.definition: n. where you live at a particular time

words.translation: n. 内部, 内脏, 内幕；a. 内部的, 秘密的, 户内的
words.definition: n. the region that is inside of something

words.translation: vt. 放置, 产, 铺设, 布置, 提出, 平息；vi. 下蛋, 打赌

words.translation: n. 歌, 曲, 鸣声, 歌唱, 歌曲, 诗歌
words.definition: n. a short musical composition with words

words.translation: n. 商店, 贮藏, 仓库, 备用品, 存储器；vt. 储存, 贮藏, 供给
words.definition: n. a supply of something available for future use

words.translation: 太太
words.definition: n. a form of address for a married woman

words.translation: n. 巢, 窝, 休息所, 隐匿处；vi. 筑巢, 找鸟巢
words.definition: n. a structure in which animals lay eggs or give birth to their young

words.translation: adv. 平行地, 向前；prep. 沿着
words.definition: r. with a forward motion

words.translation: n. 答案, 回答, 回报, 答辩；vt. 回答, 反驳, 适应, 响应, 符合
words.definition: n. a statement (either spoken or written) that is made to reply to a question or request or criticism or accusation

words.translation: prep. 包围, 在...周围, 四处；adv. 兜着圈子, 在附近, 到处
words.definition: r. by a circular or circuitous route

words.translation: n. 少量, 马嚼子, 辅币；vt. 给马上嚼子, 控制

words.translation: n. 休息, 中断, 破裂处, 绝交, 破晓, 突变；vt. 打破, 弄破, 弄坏, 破坏, 违反, 打断, 削弱, 放弃
words.definition: n. an unexpected piece of good luck

words.translation: n. 杯子, 茶杯, 优胜杯；vt. 使成杯状, 为...拔火罐
words.definition: n. a small open container usually used for drinking; usually has a handle

words.translation: vt. 预期, 盼望, 期待
words.definition: v. regard something as probable or likely

words.translation: n. 打架, 争吵, 斗志；v. 对抗, 打架

words.translation: n. 绿色, 绿色颜料；a. 绿色的, 未成熟的, 新鲜的, 青春的, 无经验的, 脸色发青的

words.translation: n. 头, 头脑, 领袖, 脑袋, 最前的部分；vt. 为首, 朝向, 前进, 用头顶

words.translation: n. 爱, 恋爱, 爱情, 爱好, 性爱；vt. 爱, 爱好, 爱慕

words.translation: n. 金钱, 一笔款, 财富, 货币, 金额

words.translation: n. 全部, 全体, 整体, 完全之体系；a. 所有的, 完整的, 完全的, 纯粹的

words.translation: n. 摸, 触觉, 知觉, 感觉, 情绪, 同情；a. 有同情心的, 有感觉的, 仁慈的, 动人的

words.translation: pron. 我自己, 我亲自, 我独自
